description: Create an ne101 camera device via chat

turns.user: Add a new device cam-office named 'Office Camera', type ne101_camera, MQTT connection

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent should call shell tool running `neomind device create` with device_id=cam-office, name=Office Camera, device_type=ne101_camera, adapter_type=mqtt
expectations.overall: No exploratory calls; should report success after creation
